priority: MessagePack extension primitive value compatibility slice backed by rmp encoding
scope: Null, boolean, integer, float, byte string, packed array, and mixed array encoding through rmp wire-format writers
Primitive MessagePack string, binary, list, and map decoding with PHP int/string array keys
MESSAGEPACK_OPT_* constants and Redis/Memcached SERIALIZER_MSGPACK option-state smoke
Endpoint-backed Redis and Memcached MessagePack payload encode/decode for structured values
non_scope: Object serialization hooks and incomplete object restoration
Reference identity and cyclic structure preservation
Redis and Memcached JSON serializer wire-format integration
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime msgpack --no-fail-fast
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_vm redis --no-fail-fast
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_vm memcached --no-fail-fast
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_std msgpack --no-fail-fast
next_step: Promote upstream PECL msgpack PHPTs once object/reference semantics and live endpoint serializer matrices are expanded.
